Description: Deliver wave starts, geofence checks, anti-cheat alerting, and submit idempotency so gameplay is fair and auditable.
Acceptance Criteria: Epic complete when all Sprint 1 child stories are done and CI is green.

Description: Deliver scheduled hints, announcements, incident mode controls, ops dashboard, and offline-safe retries.
Acceptance Criteria: Epic complete when all Sprint 2 child stories are done and game-day drill passes.

Summary: Add DB schema for starts, geo checks, and alerts
Description: Create migrations for team_start_windows, clue_geo_rules, team_location_checks, anti_cheat_alerts, and submission idempotency fields.
Acceptance Criteria: Migrations apply cleanly in local and prod; rollback scripts documented; no data loss in existing tables.

Description: Add POST /api/admin/start-waves to assign start times and optional grace windows by team.
Acceptance Criteria: Admin can assign/update starts for all teams; invalid team IDs rejected; changes are auditable.

Summary: Enforce start gate in gameplay endpoints
Description: Block scan-session, scan-validate, submit, pass, and sabotage before effective team start.
Acceptance Criteria: Blocked endpoints return 423 with secondsUntilStart and do not mutate state.

Description: Add GET /api/team/me/start-state for canStart, effectiveStartAt, waveName, and countdown.
Acceptance Criteria: Endpoint returns correct state before and after start; auth required.

Summary: Implement geofence rule model and admin management
Description: Support per-clue geo requirements with radius and accuracy thresholds.
Acceptance Criteria: Admin can configure geo rules per clue; validation rejects malformed coordinates and radii.

Description: Add POST /api/team/me/location-check and persist accepted/rejected checks with reason codes.
Acceptance Criteria: Outside radius or low accuracy returns accepted=false with reasonCode; valid checks return accepted=true and distanceM.

Description: Generate alerts for impossible speed, suspicious IP/device churn, repeated rapid retries, and duplicate media hash.
Acceptance Criteria: Alerts are written with severity and payload; flagged submissions route to NEEDS_REVIEW path.

Description: Add GET /api/admin/anti-cheat/alerts and POST /api/admin/anti-cheat/alerts/{id}/resolve.
Acceptance Criteria: Admin can filter by status/severity/team with pagination and resolve alerts with notes.

Description: Require x-idempotency-key on /api/team/me/submit and enforce unique(team,idempotencyKey) behavior.
Acceptance Criteria: Same payload + same key returns original submissionId; mismatched payload returns 409.

Summary: Build Admin UI for anti-cheat operations
Description: Add anti-cheat tab with alert queue, severity badges, and resolve actions.
Acceptance Criteria: Admins can resolve alerts from UI and see queue refresh in realtime or polling.

Summary: Update OpenAPI and backend integration tests
Description: Document new endpoints and add tests for start gating, geofence checks, alerts, and idempotency.
Acceptance Criteria: CI covers happy-path and failure-path cases; all tests pass in GitHub Actions.

Description: Run migrations, verify health, and validate key flows in production.
Acceptance Criteria: Prod migration succeeds; smoke tests pass; rollback instructions verified.

Summary: Add schema and logic for scheduled hints
Description: Create clue_hints and team_hint_events with release_after_seconds and penalty points.
Acceptance Criteria: Hints become available only at release time; hint events are persisted and auditable.

Description: Add POST /api/admin/clues/{clueIndex}/hints and POST /api/team/me/hints/request.
Acceptance Criteria: Teams cannot request unavailable hints; allowed hints deduct exact points once per request.

Description: Add create/list/read announcement endpoints with team delivery/read receipts.
Acceptance Criteria: Broadcast and targeted announcements deliver via socket and are retrievable via polling API.

Description: Allow all-team and per-team sends with severity and expiry controls.
Acceptance Criteria: Admin can send, preview, and verify delivery/read stats in UI.

Description: Add NORMAL, DEGRADED, HARD_PAUSE mode handling and enforcement across mutating gameplay endpoints.
Acceptance Criteria: HARD_PAUSE blocks all mutating play actions with 423; read endpoints remain available.

Description: Add one-click mode switch with reason and visible active-mode banner.
Acceptance Criteria: Mode changes apply within 5s and are reflected in admin/player status displays.

Description: Add GET /api/admin/ops/dashboard for review backlog, anti-cheat queue, socket health, and p95 submission latency.
Acceptance Criteria: Endpoint returns bounded metrics quickly (<500ms under normal load).

Description: Add client-side queued actions with stable idempotency keys and replay on reconnect.
Acceptance Criteria: Reconnect does not create duplicate scoring; queued actions replay in order with user-visible sync state.

Summary: Update smoke scripts and runbook for new controls
Description: Extend smoke/synthetic checks and runbook steps for hints, announcements, and incident mode drills.
Acceptance Criteria: Scripts verify new endpoints and incident behavior; runbook includes game-day commands.

Description: Add Playwright + API tests plus light load test for finals submission spikes.
Acceptance Criteria: E2E pass in CI; load test shows no duplicate submissions and acceptable latency under target concurrency.

Description: Execute full event drill including staggered starts, anti-cheat triage, announcements, and incident pause/resume.
Acceptance Criteria: Drill completed in <60 minutes with documented findings and no P1 blockers.
